'%3Bdisplay%3Aflex%3Balign-items%3Acenter%3Bgap%3A5px%3B')%3B%20const%20SVG_NS%20%3D%20'http%3A%2F%2Fwww.w3.org%2F2000%2Fsvg'%3B%20const%20arrow%20%3D%20document.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C%20'svg')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('width'%2C%20'12')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('height'%2C%20'12')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('viewBox'%2C%20'0%200%2016%2016')%3B%20arrow.setAttribute('fill'%2C%20'currentColor')%3B%20const%20arrowP%20%3D%20document.createElementNS(SVG_NS%2C%20'path')%3B%20arrowP.setAttribute('d'%2C%20'M8%201L3%206h3v6h4V6h3L8%201z')%3B%20arrowP.setAttribute('transform'%2C%20'rotate(180%208%208)')%3B%20arrow.appendChild(arrowP)%3B%20pasteHint.append(arrow%2C%20'Paste%20into%20Claude%20Code%20or%20any%20LLM')%3B%20const%20pickBtn%20%3D%20mkBtn('Stop%20picking'%2C%20false)%3B%20pickBtn.style.width%20%3D%20'100%25'%3B%20body.append(hint%2C%20list%2C%20outRow%2C%20pasteHint%2C%20pickBtn)%3B%20panel.append(header%2C%20body)%3B%20function%20mkBtn(label%2C%20primary)%20%7B%20const%20b%20%3D%20el('button'%2C%20'padding%3A7px%2014px%3Bborder-radius%3A8px%3Bfont%3A12px%2F1%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'font-weight%3A500%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Btransition%3Aall%20.12s%20ease%3B'%20%2B%20'border%3A1px%20solid%20'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20'rgba(0%2C0%2C0%2C.15)'%20%3A%20C.bdDef)%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'background%3A'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20C.accent%20%3A%20C.bgSurf)%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20'color%3A'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20'%23FAF9F5'%20%3A%20C.txPri)%20%2B%20'%3B'%20%2B%20(primary%20%3F%20'box-shadow%3A0%201px%203px%20rgba(91%2C33%2C182%2C.35)%2Cinset%200%201px%200%20rgba(255%2C255%2C255%2C.15)%3B'%20%3A%20'')%2C%20label)%3B%20b.onmouseenter%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accentHv%20%3A%20C.bgHover%3B%20b.onmouseleave%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accent%20%3A%20C.bgSurf%3B%20b.onmousedown%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accentAc%20%3A%20C.bgMuted%3B%20b.onmouseup%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20b.style.background%20%3D%20primary%20%3F%20C.accentHv%20%3A%20C.bgHover%3B%20return%20b%3B%20%7D%20const%20PSEUDO_RE%20%3D%20%2F%3A(hover%7Cfocus%7Cfocus-within%7Cfocus-visible%7Cactive%7Cvisited%7Cdisabled%7Cchecked%7Cenabled%7Cread-only%7Cplaceholder-shown%7Cinvalid%7Cvalid%7Crequired)(%3F!%5B-(%5D)%2Fg%3B%20function%20matchesWithPseudo(target%2C%20selectorText)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(target.matches(selectorText))%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20true%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20if%20(PSEUDO_RE.test(selectorText))%20%7B%20PSEUDO_RE.lastIndex%20%3D%200%3B%20const%20stripped%20%3D%20selectorText.replace(PSEUDO_RE%2C%20'').replace(%2F%3A%3A%3F%24%2Fg%2C%20'')%3B%20if%20(!stripped)%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20false%20%7D%3B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(target.matches(stripped))%20%7B%20const%20pseudos%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20let%20m%3B%20PSEUDO_RE.lastIndex%20%3D%200%3B%20while%20((m%20%3D%20PSEUDO_RE.exec(selectorText)))%20pseudos.push(m%5B1%5D)%3B%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20true%2C%20states%3A%20pseudos%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20%7D%20return%20%7B%20match%3A%20false%20%7D%3B%20%7D%20function%20walkRules(rules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20media)%20%7B%20for%20(const%20r%20of%20rules)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(r.selectorText)%20%7B%20const%20res%20%3D%20matchesWithPseudo(target%2C%20r.selectorText)%3B%20if%20(res.match)%20%7B%20const%20entry%20%3D%20%7B%20selector%3A%20r.selectorText%2C%20css%3A%20r.style.cssText%20%7D%3B%20if%20(media)%20entry.media%20%3D%20media%3B%20if%20(res.states)%20entry.states%20%3D%20res.states%3B%20acc.push(entry)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20if%20(r.styleSheet)%20%7B%20walkRules(r.styleSheet.cssRules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20(r.media%20%26%26%20r.media.mediaText)%20%7C%7C%20media)%3B%20%7D%20else%20if%20(r.cssRules)%20%7B%20walkRules(r.cssRules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20r.conditionText%20%7C%7C%20(r.media%20%26%26%20r.media.mediaText)%20%7C%7C%20media)%3B%20%7D%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20%7D%20%7D%20function%20isJunkRule(selector%2C%20css%2C%20media)%20%7B%20const%20sel%20%3D%20selector.replace(%2F%5Cs%2B%2Fg%2C%20'%20').trim()%3B%20if%20(%2F%5E%5C*(%5Cs*%2C%5Cs*(%3A%3A%3F%5Cw%2B))*%24%2F.test(sel))%20return%20true%3B%20if%20(%2F%5E(--.%2B%3F%3A%5Cs*%5B%5E%3B%5D*%3B%5Cs*)%2B%24%2F.test(css)%20%26%26%20!css.replace(%2F--%5B%5Cw-%5D%2B%3A%5Cs*%5B%5E%3B%5D*%3B%3F%5Cs*%2Fg%2C%20'').trim())%20return%20true%3B%20if%20(media%20%26%26%20%2Fprefers-reduced-motion%2F.test(media))%20return%20true%3B%20return%20false%3B%20%7D%20let%20_corsFixed%20%3D%20false%3B%20async%20function%20fixCorsSheets()%20%7B%20if%20(_corsFixed)%20return%3B%20_corsFixed%20%3D%20true%3B%20const%20fetches%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20for%20(const%20sh%20of%20document.styleSheets)%20%7B%20try%20%7B%20sh.cssRules%3B%20continue%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20if%20(!sh.href)%20continue%3B%20try%20%7B%20if%20(new%20URL(sh.href).origin%20!%3D%3D%20location.origin)%20continue%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%7D%20fetches.push(%20fetch(sh.href).then(r%20%3D%3E%20r.text()).then(css%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20s%20%3D%20document.createElement('style')%3B%20s.dataset.chromecap%20%3D%20'1'%3B%20s.textContent%20%3D%20css%3B%20document.head.appendChild(s)%3B%20%7D).catch(()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%7D)%20)%3B%20%7D%20await%20Promise.all(fetches)%3B%20%7D%20function%20resolveVars(cssText%2C%20target)%20%7B%20const%20root%20%3D%20getComputedStyle(document.documentElement)%3B%20const%20elCS%20%3D%20getComputedStyle(target)%3B%20return%20cssText.replace(%2Fvar%5C(--%5B%5Cw-%5D%2B(%3F%3A%5Cs*%2C%5Cs*%5B%5E)%5D%2B)%3F%5C)%2Fg%2C%20m%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20const%20name%20%3D%20m.match(%2Fvar%5C((--%5B%5Cw-%5D%2B)%2F)%5B1%5D%3B%20const%20val%20%3D%20elCS.getPropertyValue(name).trim()%20%7C%7C%20root.getPropertyValue(name).trim()%3B%20return%20val%20%3F%20val%20%3A%20m%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20function%20getRules(target)%20%7B%20const%20acc%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20const%20seen%20%3D%20new%20Set()%3B%20for%20(const%20sh%20of%20document.styleSheets)%20%7B%20let%20rules%3B%20try%20%7B%20rules%20%3D%20sh.cssRules%3B%20%7D%20catch%20%7B%20continue%3B%20%7D%20walkRules(rules%2C%20target%2C%20acc%2C%20(sh.media%20%26%26%20sh.media.mediaText)%20%7C%7C%20undefined)%3B%20%7D%20return%20acc.filter(r%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(isJunkRule(r.selector%2C%20r.css%2C%20r.media))%20return%20false%3B%20const%20key%20%3D%20r.selector%20%2B%20'%7C'%20%2B%20r.css%20%2B%20'%7C'%20%2B%20(r.media%20%7C%7C%20'')%3B%20if%20(seen.has(key))%20return%20false%3B%20seen.add(key)%3B%20return%20true%3B%20%7D).map(r%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20if%20(r.css.includes('var(--'))%20%7B%20r.cssResolved%20%3D%20resolveVars(r.css%2C%20target)%3B%20%7D%20return%20r%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20const%20PROPS%20%3D%20%5B%20'display'%2C'position'%2C'top'%2C'right'%2C'bottom'%2C'left'%2C'width'%2C'height'%2C%20'margin'%2C'padding'%2C'border'%2C'border-radius'%2C'box-sizing'%2C'box-shadow'%2C%20'background'%2C'color'%2C'opacity'%2C%20'font-family'%2C'font-size'%2C'font-weight'%2C'font-style'%2C'line-height'%2C%20'letter-spacing'%2C'text-align'%2C'text-decoration'%2C'text-transform'%2C'white-space'%2C%20'flex'%2C'flex-direction'%2C'flex-wrap'%2C'justify-content'%2C'align-items'%2C'align-self'%2C'gap'%2C%20'grid-template-columns'%2C'grid-template-rows'%2C'grid-column'%2C'grid-row'%2C%20'overflow'%2C'z-index'%2C'transform'%2C'transition'%2C'cursor'%2C'object-fit'%2C%20%5D%3B%20const%20DEFAULTS%20%3D%20%7B%20'display'%3A'inline'%2C'position'%3A'static'%2C'top'%3A'auto'%2C'right'%3A'auto'%2C'bottom'%3A'auto'%2C'left'%3A'auto'%2C%20'width'%3A'auto'%2C'height'%3A'auto'%2C'margin'%3A'0px'%2C'padding'%3A'0px'%2C'border'%3A'0px%20none%20rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)'%2C%20'border-radius'%3A'0px'%2C'box-sizing'%3A'content-box'%2C'box-shadow'%3A'none'%2C%20'color'%3A'rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)'%2C'opacity'%3A'1'%2C'font-style'%3A'normal'%2C'font-weight'%3A'400'%2C%20'letter-spacing'%3A'normal'%2C'text-align'%3A'start'%2C'text-decoration'%3A'none%20solid%20rgb(0%2C%200%2C%200)'%2C%20'text-transform'%3A'none'%2C'white-space'%3A'normal'%2C'flex'%3A'0%201%20auto' %3C%201024%20%3F%20'tablet'%20%3A%20'desktop'%20%7D%3B%20var%20activeSet%20%3D%20new%20Set()%2C%20inactiveSet%20%3D%20new%20Set()%3B%20normalCaps.forEach(function(cap)%20%7B%20if%20(cap.viewport)%20%7B%20(cap.viewport.activeMedia%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D).forEach(function(m)%20%7B%20activeSet.add(m)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20(cap.viewport.inactiveMedia%20%7C%7C%20%5B%5D).forEach(function(m)%20%7B%20inactiveSet.add(m)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20%7D)%3B%20if%20(activeSet.size)%20mergedVp.activeMedia%20%3D%20Array.from(activeSet)%3B%20if%20(inactiveSet.size)%20mergedVp.inactiveMedia%20%3D%20Array.from(inactiveSet)%3B%20var%20envelope%20%3D%20%7B%20url%3A%20location.href%2C%20title%3A%20document.title%2C%20timestamp%3A%20new%20Date().toISOString()%2C%20viewport%3A%20mergedVp%2C%20%7D%3B%20if%20(fw)%20envelope.frameworks%20%3D%20fw%3B%20var%20rels%20%3D%20buildRelationships()%3B%20if%20(rels)%20envelope.relationships%20%3D%20rels%3B%20var%20rulePool%20%3D%20%5B%5D%3B%20var%20ruleIndex%20%3D%20%7B%7D%3B%20envelope.elements%20%3D%20normalCaps.map(function(cap)%20%7B%20var%20el%20%3D%20%7B%7D%3B%20var%20lm%20%3D%20cap._el%20%26%26%20cap._el.isConnected%20%3F%20nearestLandmark(cap._el)%20%3A%20null%3B%20if%20(lm)%20el.landmark%20%3D%20lm%3B%20for%20(var%20k%20in%20cap)%20%7B%20if%20(k%20%3D%3D%3D%20'_el'%20%7C%7C%20hoisted.indexOf(k)%20!%3D%3D%20-1)%20continue%3B%20el%5Bk%5D%20%3D%20cap%5Bk%5D%3B%20%7D%20if%20(el.cssRules%20%26%26%20el.cssRules.length)%20%7B%20el.cssRuleRefs%20%3D%20el.cssRules.map(function(rule)%20%7B%20var%20key%20%3D%20JSON.stringify(rule)%3B%20if%20(ruleIndex%5Bkey%5D%20%3D%3D%3D%20undefined)%20%7B%20ruleIndex%5Bkey%5D%20%3D%20rulePool.length%3B%20rulePool.push(rule)%3B%20%7D%20return%20ruleIndex%5Bkey%5D%3B%20%7D)%3B%20delete%20el.cssRules%3B%20%7D%20return%20el%3B%20%7D)%3B%20if%20(rulePool.length)%20envelope.cssRules%20%3D%20rulePool%3B%20var%20hint%20%3D%20'%5BThis%20is%20a%20captured%20UI%20snippet%20from%20a%20real%20webpage.%20'%20%2B%20'Common%20tasks%3A%20replicate%20t )%3B%20var%20sizeText%20%3D%20cap._layout%20%3F%20countNodes(cap.tree)%20%2B%20'%20nodes'%20%3A%20words%20%3E%20999%20%3F%20(words%20%2F%201000).toFixed(1)%20%2B%20'k%20w'%20%3A%20words%20%2B%20'%20w'%3B%20const%20size%20%3D%20el('span'%2C%20'flex%3A1%3Bfont-size%3A10px%3Bcolor%3A'%20%2B%20C.txTer%20%2B%20'%3Bfont-family%3Aui-monospace%2CMenlo%2Cmonospace%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%3B'%2C%20sizeText)%3B%20const%20dim%20%3D%20el('span'%2C%20'font-size%3A10px%3Bcolor%3A'%20%2B%20C.txTer%20%2B%20'%3Bfont-family%3Aui-monospace%2CMenlo%2Cmonospace%3Bwhite-space%3Anowrap%3B'%2C%20cap.rect.width%20%2B%20'%5Cu00d7'%20%2B%20cap.rect.height)%3B%20const%20x%20%3D%20el('button'%2C%20'width%3A18px%3Bheight%3A18px%3Bborder%3A0%3Bborder-radius%3A4px%3Bbackground%3Atransparent%3B'%20%2B%20'color%3A'%20%2B%20C.txTer%20%2B%20'%3Bcursor%3Apointer%3Bfont%3A12px%2F1%20'%20%2B%20FONT%20%2B%20'%3Bpadding%3A0%3Bflex-shrink%3A0%3B'%2C%20'%5Cu2715')%3B%20x.onmouseenter%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20x.style.background%20%3D%20C.bgHover%3B%20x.style.color%20%3D%20C.txPri%3B%20%7D%3B%20x.onmouseleave%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20x.style.background%20%3D%20'transparent'%3B%20x.style.color%20%3D%20C.txTer%3B%20%7D%3B%20x.onclick%20%3D%20()%20%3D%3E%20%7B%20captures.splice(i%2C%201)%3B%20render()%3B%20%7D%3B%20row.append(chip%2C%20modeTag%2C%20size%2C%20dim%2C%20x)%3B%20list.appendChild(row)%3B%20%7D)%3B%20%7D%20function%20onMove(e)%20%7B%20const%20t%20%3D%20e.target%3B%20if%20(panel.contains(t))%20%7B%20hl.style.display%20%3D%20'none'%3B%20hoverEl%20%3D%20null%3B%20return%3B%20%7D%20const%20r%20%3D%20t.getBoundingClientRect()%3B%20hl.style.display%20%3D%20'block'%3B%20hl.style.top%20%3D%20r.top%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20hl.style.left%20%3D%20r.left%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20hl.style.width%20%3D%20r.width%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20hl.style.height%20%3D%20r.height%20%2B%20'px'%3B%20hlLabel.textContent%20%3D%20selApprox(t)%3B%20hoverEl%20%3D%20t%3B%20%7D%20function%20onClick(e)%20%7B%20if%20(panel.contains(e.target))%20return%3B% board.writeText)%20%7B%20navigator.clipboard.writeText(out.value).then(done%2C%20fallback)%3B%20%7D%20else%20fallback()%3B%20%7D%3B%20closeBtn.onclick%20%3D%20destroy%3B%20const%20style%20%3D%20el('style')%3B%20style.textContent%20%3D%20'%40keyframes%20chromecap-pulse%7B0%25%2C100%25%7Bopacity%3A1%3Btransform%3Ascale(1)%7D50%25%7Bopacity%3A.4%3Btransform%3Ascale(.8)%7D%7D'%3B%20document.head.appendChild(style)%3B%20document.body.appendChild(panel)%3B%20window.__chromeCap%20%3D%20%7B%20toggle%3A%20()%20%3D%3E%20picking%20%3F%20stop()%20%3A%20start()%2C%20destroy%20%7D%3B%20start()%3B%20%7D)()%3B
